name: Contra Loma Regional Park - Group Picnic Sites (EBRPD)

name: Hannah Nicole Vineyards & Winery

name: Downtown Antioch Rivertown Public Parking Lots
address: Rivertown, near 2nd & G Streets, Antioch, CA 94509
price_notes: City-owned Rivertown parking lots in downtown Antioch (near 2nd/G Streets). City has considered allowing a restaurant to use a portion of a lot for a dining deck, indicating flexible activation potential. Stall count not stated.

name: Antioch Marina / Barbara Price Marina Park Lot
address: 5 Marina Plaza (foot of L Street), Antioch, CA 94509
price_notes: Large waterfront surface lot at the foot of L Street (5 Marina Plaza) in downtown Antioch's Rivertown; approximately 180 vehicle spaces plus 80 trailer spaces and 12 ADA per SF Bay Water Trail. Considerable free parking per Pier Fishing.

name: Antioch Rivertown Square (Former Antioch Lumber Company / Beede Lumber Yard)
address: Downtown Rivertown along the Sacramento-San Joaquin River, near W. 2nd Street & E Street, Antioch, CA 94509
price_notes: Former Antioch Lumber Company / Beede lumber yard site in historic downtown Rivertown along the Sacramento-San Joaquin River; city is planning it as 'River Town Square,' a park and event center / community gathering space. Acreage not stated.

name: Round Hill Country Club
price_notes: Spaces & capacities: Vista Ballroom 320 seated (280 with dance floor); Breezeway 160 event / 80 dining; traditional room 160 seated / 80 patio; golf-course-overlook area 140 seated. No published dollar pricing. Address 3169 Round Hill Rd per club contact page.

name: San Pablo Community Hall
price_notes: Cap 96. Includes 15 rectangular + 10 round tables, 96 chairs, full commercial kitchen. Hourly rate includes $5/hr maintenance fee; base rate not captured.

name: Amador Rancho Center
address: 1998 Rancho Park Loop Rd, San Ramon, CA 94582
price_notes: Bella Vista assembly 200 / dining 160. Private: Resident $112 Mon-Thu / $177 Fri-Sun; Non-Res $140/$222. Rose bundle 8-hr $1,775 R / $2,150 NR.

name: Canyon View Event Center
address: 680 Bollinger Canyon Way, San Ramon, CA
price_notes: $6,345 starting price; 300+ guests. Outdoor patio ceremony + indoor ballroom with panoramic city views. Full-service catering; bar services ~$12/person.

name: Crescent Bistro
price_notes: Covered patio up to 30 adults; dining room up to 50 adults; custom menus. No pricing published.

name: Modern, Private Meeting Room
price_notes: $55/hr, 2 hr minimum, 205 sqft, 8-person conference room.

name: San Ramon Community Center at Central Park
price_notes: Fountain Room assembly 350 / dining 250. Hourly private: Resident Mon-Thu $145 / Fri-Sun $301; Non-Res $182/$377. Diamond 10-hr wedding bundle $5,100 R / $6,400 NR. Terrace dining 80.

name: Creative SoMa Loft
price_notes: Creative SoMa loft (Showplace Square); from $300/hr, 4-hour minimum, $350 cleaning fee. Prices include sales tax.

name: Loft-Style Workspace (SoMa)
address: 440 9th St, Suite B, San Francisco, CA
price_notes: Loft-style workspace, entire venue; from $90/hr.

name: Forbes Mill Steakhouse Danville
price_notes: The Sycamore Room (private, indoor): 40 seated / 60 standing; price $31-$50 per person (OpenTable). Privacy glass doors, 82-inch screen.

name: Piatti Danville
price_notes: Tuscan Room (private) up to 38 seated/45 cocktail; Mediterranean Room 45 seated/60 cocktail; Back Patio 60 seated/80 cocktail; Full buyout 200 seated/300 cocktail. No room fee; F&B minimum applies (varies), $200 deposit ($500 May/Jun/Dec).

name: Benihana Concord
price_notes: Private & semi-private dining rooms offered for groups around the hibachi grill; specific capacities and pricing not published.

name: Downtown Concord Grant Street Parking Garage
price_notes: Grant Street garage near Todos Santos Plaza; Swift Plaza campus notes 126 spaces in the 1755 Grant Street garage. Free public garage per Visit Concord.

name: Downtown Concord Salvio Street Parking Garage
address: Salvio St & Colfax St, Concord, CA 94520
price_notes: Concord Redevelopment Agency parking garage at Salvio & Colfax, across from The Parlor Barber Shop (2230 Salvio St). Free public parking. Two adjacent downtown city garages total approximately 941 spaces per LoopNet listing for 2151 Salvio St.

name: Downtown Concord Todos Santos Parking Center
price_notes: Free public parking center across from 2068 Salvio St, adjacent to Todos Santos Plaza. One of two free city garages serving downtown Concord events per Visit Concord.

name: Civic Park Community Center (Assembly Hall)
price_notes: Assembly Hall $495/event weekday (3-hr min); Fri/Sun $1,575/7hr; Sat $2,520/9hr. Alcohol fee $200 (no hard liquor). Gazebo +$700. Capacity not confirmed from source.

name: Creekside Hall
price_notes: $700-$1,000/event; 350 capacity. Outside catering allowed (caterer or food truck); no outside beverages; full bar offered.

name: Galpão Gaucho Brazilian Steakhouse Walnut Creek
address: 1444 N. California Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
price_notes: Private room up to 50 guests; entire space up to 200 guests. No pricing published.

name: Havana Restaurant Walnut Creek
price_notes: 'Little Havana' private side room (own entrance & restroom, projector) up to 38 seated / 45 reception; requires a food & beverage minimum (amount not published).

name: Massimo Ristorante
price_notes: $29-$65/person (parties). Main dining room 100, upstairs banquet 50, downstairs banquet 35, outdoor patio 30. On-site catering; full bar. | Upstairs banquet room max 50; downstairs banquet room 35; main dining room max 100; outdoor patio up to 30. No pricing published.

name: Montesacro Walnut Creek - Event Area
price_notes: 31 seated / 50 standing. Alcohol licence until 9:00 pm (extension available). Price not stated on page.

name: Mt. Diablo Boardroom with Kitchen
price_notes: $350/hr; capacity 15. Meeting/lunch events; catering kitchen, A/V equipment.

name: Mt. Diablo Cafe
price_notes: $500/hr; capacity 15. Indoor event space in renovated plaza; natural lighting, outdoor access.

name: Mt. Diablo Outdoor Space
price_notes: $650/hr; capacity 15 (min rate based on 10-hr day for crew of 15 or less). Renovated plaza with outdoor TV/eating area.

name: Original Joe's Walnut Creek
price_notes: Private Dining Room up to 40 guests (own bar, indoor-outdoor fireplace, private patio). Subject to F&B minimum, room fee, service charge & tax (amounts not published).

name: Parada New Peru
price_notes: $12-$21.50/person; max 80 people. On-site catering; full bar/lounge.

name: Private Wine Tasting Events
price_notes: $100/hr; max capacity 15 persons for private wine tasting. Outside food allowed.

name: Renaissance Walnut Creek Hotel
price_notes: Nearly 4,000 sq ft of venues; Renaissance Room accommodates 130 wedding banquet guests.

name: Spacious Backyard Oasis: Bring Your Own Decorations!
price_notes: $180/hr; 100 guests; 12,000 sq ft backyard with lawns and patios, main gazebo. Also appears on Peerspace as 'Charming backyard venue'.

name: Spacious and Gracious Multi-Space Venue
price_notes: Sanctuary $250/hr (seats up to 200, 2400 sf); Community Room $125/hr; lawn/patio only $75/hr; Sanctuary+Community Room combined $350/hr. Outside food and non-alcoholic beverages allowed; cooking allowed on-site.

name: Spoontonic Lounge
address: 2580 N Main Suite A, Walnut Creek, CA
price_notes: Max 95 people. Nightclub/lounge. Price not stated on page.

name: The Clubhouse at Boundary Oak
address: 3800 Valley Vista Rd, Walnut Creek, CA 94598
price_notes: Per-guest packages (up to 100 guests): Devotion $100, Tradition $115, Forever $145, Legacy $160; ceremony fee $2,500; Saturday-evening surcharge $25/guest (Apr-Oct) or $15/guest (Nov-Mar); 22% service charge. Here Comes The Guide lists all-inclusive at $120/person with 2-hr pre-event access + 5-hr rental and rental fee $0-4,000/event. Max capacity 250. | Spaces for 250-300 guests (1 ballroom, 1 country club). Golf course clubhouse with views of Concord/San Ramon Valley.

name: The Ruth Bancroft Garden
price_notes: 100 max seated / 180 max standing. Outdoor garden plus indoor Visitor & Education Center. Pricing not listed on PartySlate.

name: Torsap Thai Kitchen Walnut Creek
price_notes: Full restaurant buyout 125-150 (5,000 sq ft), packages start at $95/person; Patio 30-35 seated/40+ reception; Small Private Gatherings 35-40.

name: Walnut Creek Historical Society - Shadelands Ranch Museum
address: 2660 Ygnacio Valley Rd, Walnut Creek, CA 94598
price_notes: PartySlate: spaces for 150-300 guests (1 outdoor). Eventective lists Shadelands Ranch Museum at $2,000/event, 300 capacity. Historic ranch museum.
